steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The passage notes that few Joyce scholars worldwide had expertise in such textual issues and most of those who did worked on the edition with Gabler.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the choices
steps.content:
B correctly notes that reviewers lacked expertise in either Joyce studies or editorial theory, so they were likely to view the edition favorably.
The other three either claim negativity without basis, invoke irrelevant publication patterns, or misstate who reviewed the edition.
That matches choice B — B is correct.
